text: There's no telling what we might find inside!
After you, Dragonborn. You should have the honor of being the first to set foot in Sky Haven Temple.
You did it. There's the entrance!
That's done it! Look, it's coming to life!
Look here! You see how the ancient Blades revered Reman Cyrodiil.
This whole place appears to be a shrine to Reman. He ended the Akaviri invasion under mysterious circumstances, you recall.
After the so-called "battle" of Pale Pass, the Akaviri went into his service. This was the foundation stone of the Second Empire.
Gods above, what are you waiting for?
Esbern's probably right. Try using your blood on the carved seal on the floor.
If you need help drawing some blood, let me know.
Try dripping blood onto the carving on the floor.
Ah... here's the "blood seal." Another of the lost Akaviri arts. No doubt triggered by... well, blood.
I can't believe you did that. You people are monsters!
You demand payment for protection and you can't even protect yourselves.
Take your coin and tell Brynjolf to leave us alone.
A flame atronach's body might provide fire salt. They're dangerous creatures that can be summoned by wizards.
Of course, it would be much easier to check with an alchemist. They occasionally have them for sale.
Amazing! These must have been very hard to come by.
You've saved my business and warmed an old smith's heart. For that, I thank you.
Shutting this place down would dishonor my family's heritage, but what other choice will I have?
You will? Thank you! Ten pinches of fire salts should give me all I need to bring this forge back to life.
The Reach belongs to the Forsworn!
The Reach belongs to the Forsworn!
The Reach belongs to the Forsworn!
The Reach belongs to the Forsworn!
The Reach belongs to the Forsworn!
What's going on, Madanach? You wouldn't have old Grisvar killed unless you weren't planning on needing him.
Ha! Like the bite of a flea!
Ugh! That it? That your best?
By Ysmir, you'll pay for that!
That the best you can do?
I'm prepared to negotiate my surrender!
Agh! I been wounded worse by better!
Ha! I've suffered worse during training!
That's it? That's all you've got?
I'll shatter your bones like glass!
Ooh, now that one must have hurt!
Give up while you still can!
I'm going to... put you down!
I'll try and make this quick!
No more! I yield! I yield!
I'll be back, and you'll be dead!
I'll live to drink another day!
I'm not sticking around to fight a dragon!
May you walk on warm sands.
Care to try out a new ring, or perhaps my daughter could make you a necklace...
Ever taken a swim in the Illinalta? Take care you don't get nipped if you do. Folk say it's teeming with slaughterfish. Who knows what else.
My daughter Adrianne wants to forge a new sword for you. Now, it wouldn't be a Skyforge blade, I know, but she really is quite gifted...
Ahhh... Vasha, at your service. Obtainer of goods, taker of lives, and defiler of daughters.
Congratulations. You slaughtered an emaciated beggar in cold blood. You are truly an opponent to be feared.
My daughter's driving me crazy, so forgive me if I'm a bit on edge.
Any idea how I can get my daughter's head out of the clouds?
I was apprenticed to Balimund before he died. He taught me everything I know about forging armor and weapons.
I've been running interference for you around here. I don't think anyone's caught on to our little campaign. Yet.
Yes, my daughter, what is it I can help with?
Adara bends the silver so naturally. Grandmother would have cried if she saw how deft our daughter has become.
I'd rather not talk about my daughter, if you'll excuse me.
Hroggar's house? He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
Hroggar's house fire? Aye. He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
Hroggar's house? He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
Hroggar's house fire? He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
I'm worried about my daughter. I'm keeping an eye on her for a little while before I pass on.
A parent should never outlive a child. Having my daughter's spirit here... it's as if she never died.
A parent should never outlive a child. Having my daughter's spirit here... it's as if she never died.
Our daughter, Fjotra, was taken from here. The Forsworn descended and... they didn't touch anything else. Just our little girl.
It's considered a great honor for the family. Their daughter will never know hardship, and the goddess blesses them with great bounty.
Ysmir's beard, you're right! No fish was ever caught by staying away from the shore. I'm off to see her!
The daughters of this land are just as strong and loyal as its men.
I've got a hungry daughter to feed, so selling my produce is really the only thing I care about.
My daughter Braith says I read too much. "Play with me, mother!" Girls need to learn how to take care of themselves.
Sometimes I miss the soldier's life, but when I hold my daughter in my arms, I know I made the right choice.
I'm kept so busy, I don't get to see my daughter as often as I'd like. Perhaps you've met her? Adrianne? She owns the shop, Warmaiden's.
My brother takes council from Proventus Avenicci? What a laugh. He takes council from his daughter, and she's a bloody blacksmith.
Here's everythin' you need. You get caught, and we've never heard of you.
Being connected to a criminal didn't make the client happy... next time, act like a real thief and don't get caught.
My daughter died. Things won't be the same without her.
I caught a glimpse of that captured dragon. It's.. beautiful. In its own way.
I have to wonder... what does the Dragonborn do once he's summoned by the Greybeards? Can the Thu'um be taught, like any skill?
Our daughter. Our little girl. She hadn't seen her tenth winter.
Who taught you to fight? Keep those hands up!
Being old's not so bad. Daughter keeps me fed, and my working days are done.
Well, now. I'm afraid you've caught me a bit out of my element. Most of my time is spent in the Temple of the Divines, you see.
It only hurts when I laugh. He he he. Owww...
Most women would rather die than dig, but I have a daughter to raise.
I hear there's baked slaughterfish tonight.
My mother taught me the millwork trade... you know, which trees to cut and which ones to pass up.
Daughter. Who is this you have brought me?
I'm grateful, Skaggi. I'm sorry my daughter gives you so much trouble.
Serving in the Legion taught me to respect leadership. The stronghold needs Burguk.
Her daughter was sent to Whiterun, the skirmishes there have been violent. The whiterun legate, he needed to know the Stormcloak positions.
My daughter Adara is also my apprentice. She's a quick study.
My daughter Adara is going to be a fine silversmith when she's older.
Caught a case of Rockjoint, once. Bothela at the Hag's Cure fixed me right up.
If the guards would listen to Viola, they'd have caught the Butcher by now.
I've been a bit out of sorts since... since our daughter was taken from us.
No mother should have to bury her daughter.
Both my daughters. Now my wife? How much is one man supposed to take?
You caught me! I surrender! Ha ha ha ha.
I do hope you know what your doing with those flames. It would be quite a shame if something caught fire.
I left behind my daughter Uaile when I was taken.
How old is my daughter now, I wonder? In prison, you lose track of time.
Okay, look. If I'm caught saying anything bad about the meadery or the family, I'm a dead man.
Ow... It hurts when I laugh. He he...
What my daughter sees in that... barbarian, I'll never know.
I spend every day tending the fields, and what do my daughters do? Nothing! Complain and caterwaul! Sleep and eat! Useless!
Curse my good-for-nothing daughters! My wife was twice the woman they'll ever grow to be. She gave her life birthing them. What a waste.
No funerals, just some pain. If you get caught, it's not my problem.
No killing. I'm not hiring the Dark Brotherhood, here. If you get caught, it's not my problem.
Just cause some pain. I don't want a death on my conscience. If you get caught, it's not my problem.
Hurt him. I mean her. Whichever. No killing though. And I ain't paying your fine if you get caught.
I hope I can hear the screams. But don't let on it's from me! And I'm not paying your fine if you get caught.
Make it quick, but make it hurt. If you get caught by the guards, I don't know you.
It should hurt. A lot. But I'm not paying for murder. Oh, if you're caught, it's not my problem.
Thank you. When I find my daughter, it will be thanks to you.
My daughter was sent to the orphanage there when I stood accused of illegal necromancy. I had no choice. Run or die.
My daughter Karita sings to the guests when she can. She has her mother's voice.
Delphine? How do you... so you've finally found her, and she led you to me. And here I am, caught like a rat in a trap.
Mother thought I should be taught a lesson for airing the family's dirty laundry in public.
A few drinks, a few laughs and a contest. What could be better?
Brynjolf actually caught me trying to pick his pocket in the market. If he was anyone else I would have gotten away with it.
A servant? Enlisting in the Stormcloaks? Ah, Bulfrek, that's why I like having you about. You're always good for a laugh.
One of those things has the key to this cage. If you get me out of here I'll help you slaughter the rest of those crows.
What is it Ulfric's always saying... "On my honor as a Nord, I swear it." (Laughter).
I have some things that belonged to my daughter, Friga. She... she won't be needing them any more.
You've caught me at a bad time. I've lost someone dear to me.
How may I help you, my daughter?
If you're hungry, Marise sells fresh fish... caught by yours truly.
Come to laugh at the grave tender?
I can feel you laughing behind my back.
You think you know pain? Do you!? Try watching your wife and daughter burn alive after they've been ravaged by brigands! That's pain, my friend.
I swear they're making me do this for a laugh. At least I'm not dealing with the prisoners down below.
Alvor and I, we got a daughter. Little Dorthe.
What do you think the Imperials would be doing while this dragon is busy slaughtering my men?
Do you think the Stormcloaks will sit idle while this dragon is slaughtering my men and burning down my city?
They laughed at me again, Dinya. They simply don't understand.
Your interests lay where I wish them to lay otherwise my favorite daughter may end up homeless and without a septim to her name. Is that clear?
The Thalmor need to be taught a lesson.
Horvutah med kodaav. Caught like a bear in a trap...
You slaughtered them - the women, the children! You butchers!
What? And you call yourself a daughter of Skyrim?
Spoken like a true daughter of Skyrim!
I think you may have joined up with the wrong side, Dragonborn. You showed yourself a true daughter of Skyrim here today.
These graves hold the sons and daughters of Falkreath.
These graves hold the sons and daughters of Falkreath.
The bitter war of the world beyond was all for naught.
We grow that much stronger with each son and daughter of Skyrim who joins us. Down with the Emperor!
Ah yes, quite an amusing anecdote actually. I caught him trying to break into my laboratory.
And they got the orders backwards. Ha ha ha.  Yes, I'm writing that in.  It should be good for a laugh from the court.
You don't want to go up to that farmhouse, citizen. It's a terrible sight. The farmer and his wife, slaughtered in the night. So many knife wounds...
You want to give up now? Out of fear? Is that what we're teaching our daughter?
Her Benevolence has taught me patience and mercy, but these vampires deserve none of it.
When I was a child, my village was burned to the ground by bandits. Do you know I actually saw one laugh as he ran my brother through...
Oh, right, you were caught trying to cross the border into Skyrim, weren't you?
Look deeply into the faces of the warriors around you. These are the true sons and daughters of Skyrim. See her strength and nobility in their eyes.
We taught that dragon not to mess with Whiterun, didn't we?
Have a house with a good bit of valuables inside, but one particular item's caught my eye. You up for it?
Well, there's Ingun Black-Briar, Maven's daughter. Strange girl. She likes to spend time down in Elgrim's Elixirs working on her alchemy.
Of course she will. She's our daughter, after all.
Ha ha! Don't make me laugh.
True sons and daughters of Skyrim reign in every city, we've crippled the Imperial Legion, and cut off its head by killing General Tullius himself.
No. I trust you'll do more good out there in the world, wherever you damn well please to go. You're a true daughter of Skyrim and'll know what to do.
I can't believe I got caught.
Slaughtering the Emperor's cousin? At her wedding? Those guards will be out for blood. Wouldn't surprise me if the crowd jumped in too.
No. A chief's daughter marries who her chief wishes. It ensures the stronghold receives a fair trade in goods for my absence.
I am Larak's daughter. Soon, I'll be of age and will be sent to marry an Orc chief in some distant stronghold.
Oh, but Cicero can't talk to you. You've been naughty, naughty. I think you need to clear this whole mess up with Nazir.
My uncle Dengeir was Jarl until a short time ago. His old age and failing health caught up with him, and he stepped down.
Speak, if you have aught to say worth the listening.
My daughter Fjotli... she was murdered a few months ago. Left her laying on the ground in a pool of her own blood.
Don't make me laugh, baby Battle-Born. You'll be afraid of me till the day I kill you.
The finest fish, here! Caught daily!
I thought it high time I caught up with you.
He's proud of his service, Skald. The Legion taught us loyalty. And we're loyal to Dawnstar.
You've disgraced yourself and our cause. You are no longer fit to be known as a daughter of Skyrim.
You slaughtered the very people you claim to be fighting for! True sons of Skyrim would never do such things.
I trained our daughter Lilija as a healer... to one day tend the Shrine of Talos and replace me as a Priestess of Talos.
I think I hear my daughter calling...
My mother taught me. She was a Bard, from the college in Solitude.
Ready now! Everyone, with me! For the sons and daughters of Skyrim!
Your daughters are growing up fast, Lemkil. Seems like only yesterday they were newborn babes.
You keep on like you are, you'll end up with two daughters who hate you.
Hah! Who in their right mind would pay for dirt? You'd get laughed out of Whiterun for even trying it.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around the Reach.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Haafingar.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Hjaalmarch.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Falkreath.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Whiterun.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around the Pale.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around the Rift.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Eastmarch.
I've caught wind that one of the brighter Silver Hand has been sniffing around Winterhold.
Torsten was gratified the death of his daughter was avenged and the heirloom was returned.
Torsten was gratified the death of his daughter was avenged and the heirloom was returned.
So you're willing to starve your wife and daughter to reclaim some rusty old sword?
Like anyone, a crisis will push them towards devotion. I've been seeing a lot of the Shatter-Shields, since they lost their daughter.
I almost can't believe it. The Empire has been defeated. The world bears witness to the power and righteousness of the sons and daughters of Skyrim.
Oh. Why... why certainly. I keep telling myself I'm not losing a son, I'm gaining an Imperial. Daughter. An Imperial daughter...
I most certainly am not. I've just lost my daughter to a Nord beast, and my nephew Titus is too busy playing Emperor to even show up.
Sneak that ring back to Viola before we both get caught.
I know they laughed when I said I wanted to keep the mine open. I'll show them. I'll show them all.
Hasn't Mercer Frey taught you people anything?
Oh, but she taught her son well. Pelagius learned at a very early age that danger could come from anywhere. At any time. Delivered... by anyone.
I've been a daughter of Skyrim all my life. I love this land and her people. So do all the Nords that serve the Empire.
Ah. Well. After a little incident with a roguish lad and the daughter of a prominent Thane... Well, let's just say, best not.
Like to see him laugh his way out that.
The first mortals that I taught the Thu'um - the first Tongues. The leaders of the rebellion against Alduin.
Thanks again for finding out about my daughter.
If Erdi caught me chatting, I'd never hear the end of it...
You should speak to my daughter, Evette. She's the brains of the family.
I studied with them when I was young. They taught me how to Shout.
And my Aunt wouldn't have to worry about her daughter.
Please forgive my mood. I'm still coming to terms with my daughter's death.
Please forgive my mood. I'm still coming to terms with the death of my wife and daughters...
He owes this tavern enough coin to burn it down, build it back up, then burn it down again just for laughs.
About 30 years ago, the Aldmeri Dominion invaded the Empire. It was a surprise attack, caught everyone off guard.
I think I've taught you everything I know. You might even be as good as me now.
My father was rarely home, so it was my mother who actually taught me how to use a bow.
And so, we must each one of us, continue to fight this insurrection, lest our fallen brothers have died for naught!
Just remember everything I've taught you and you should be able to complete it.
I've been pushing the Salmon but I'll tell you the Slaughterfish is a bit better today.
Don't you see? I was like a daughter to Tova. A sister to Nilsine and Friga. But the family refuses to believe my innocence. No matter what I say.
Ulfric's not running a social club. You don't join anything. Either you're a true daughter of Skyrim, or you're not.
I'll not stand idly by while a dragon burns my hold and slaughters my people!
My father taught me an important lesson many years ago.
I had a daughter, once. She'd be 23 this year. Married to some hot-headed silver worker or maybe on her own learning the herb trade.
Then come for me, "daughter of Skyrim." Come for me!
My daughter is the one who needs your pity. I'm just a poor Forsworn whose only regret is not killing more Nords before I was locked up.
How many of their sons and daughters follow your banner? We are their families.
"All hail the Stormcloaks, the true sons and daughters of Skyrim!"
That's the spirit. By swearing this oath you become one of us. A heroine of the people. A true daughter of Skyrim. A Stormcloak. Repeat after me.
I had quite the mentor. He taught me everything he know about the nirnroot and its strange properties.
You won't be laughing when the Thalmor come to root out Stormcloak sympathizers.
It's a shame our daughter couldn't make the journey herself, but at least she still thinks of us.
Well, after a while my father caught on to what I was doing. He confronted me one night and gave me a choice.
Vex was waiting for me at the Flagon when I came in... drenched in sweat. Everyone just took a look at me and laughed.
But no! We are farmers! We are craftsmen! We are sons and daughters of shopkeepers, maid servants and soldiers!
If you know any true sons and daughters of Skyrim, tell them to head to Windhelm. Ulfric Stormcloak wants to see them.
One of Clavicus's little jests. A wizard named Sebastian Lort had a daughter who worshiped Hircine.
I have taught the Way of the Voice for centuries and the Thu'um since long before that.
This is an ode to Skyrim's truest sons and daughters... the Stormcloaks.
My daughter, Fura, was assigned to Whiterun after she joined the Imperial Army.  I was hoping you might have met her.
At this rate, the Guild won't be such a laughingstock anymore.
Ease your heart, our honor is unstained - it's by Shor's command we curb our onslaught.
Karliah's taught you nothing! Your lessons begin anew!
